entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the crop affected by peanut bud necrosis disease

entities.name: PEANUT BUD NECROSIS DISEASE
entities.description: An economically important virus disease of groundnut

entities.description: The virus (PBNV) that causes peanut bud necrosis disease

entities.description: The genus of viruses to which the peanut bud necrosis virus belongs

entities.name: DURABLE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist a disease over time, which has not been found in available germplasm for PBND

entities.name: GERMPLASM ACCESSIONS
entities.description: Available genetic resources used to search for resistance traits

entities.name: GREENHOUSE
entities.description: Controlled environment used for the evaluation of transgenic peanut plants

entities.description: Natural environment used for the evaluation of transgenic peanut plants
